zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Ludwig von Arnstein II於1080年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯希爾巴可洛斯特 阿恩斯坦時，他的父親Ludwig I. von Arnstein41歲，母親Guda van Zutphen40歲。他與Udelhilde von Odenkirchen在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1120年到1130年在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 維茲豪森阿恩斯坦，埋葬在德國賀瑟拉-迪利-可萊斯維茲拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Count Ludwig von Arnstein II于1080年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯希爾巴可洛斯特 阿恩斯坦时，他的父亲Ludwig I. von Arnstein41岁，母亲Guda van Zutphen40岁。他与Udelhilde von Odenkirchen在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1120年到1130年在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 維茲豪森阿恩斯坦，埋葬在德国賀瑟拉-迪利-可萊斯維茲拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from either of two places in northern Bavaria named Arnstein (‘eagle's crag’).

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Count Ludwig von Arnstein II was born in 1080, in Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, was 41 and his mother, Guda van Zutphen, was 40. He married Udelhilde von Odenkirchen in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died from 1120 to 1130, in Arnstein, Witzenhausen, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, and was buried in Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hesse, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Ludwig von Arnstein II est né en 1080, à Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Guda van Zutphen, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Udelhilde von Odenkirchen à Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé du 1120 au 1130, à Arnstein, Kreis Witzenhausen, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, et a été enterré à Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count Ludwig von Arnstein II 1080 in Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig I. von Arnstein 41 und seine Mutter Guda van Zutphen 40. Er hat in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland Udelhilde von Odenkirchen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 1120 bis 1130 in Arnstein, Kreis Witzenhausen, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Ludwig von Arnstein II è nato il nel 1080 nel Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Guda van Zutphen, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Udelhilde von Odenkirchen nel Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì da 1120 a 1130, nel Arnstein, Kreis Witzenhausen, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, e fu sepolto a Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Count Ludwig von Arnstein IIが1080年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ラン-クレイスセエルバチクロスター アルンステインで生まれた時，父Ludwig I. von Arnsteinは41歳，母Guda van Zutphenは40歳であった。ドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウウンテルランクレイスナッサウでUdelhilde von Odenkirchenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はから1120年まで1130年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス ウィツェーンハウセンアルンステインで死去し，ドイツヘセンラン-デル-クレイスウエトズラーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Count Ludwig von Arnstein II(이)가 1080년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 시바치 클로스터 아른스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig I. von Arnstein(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Guda van Zutphen(은)는 40세였다. 그는 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소 운털라h크레이스 나소에서 Udelhilde von Odenkirchen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1120년 부터 1130년 까지 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 윗즌하우센 아른스타인에서 사망했으며 독일 헤센 라h-디-크레이스 w츠라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Ludwig von Arnstein II nasceu em 1080, em Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Guda van Zutphen, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Udelhilde von Odenkirchen em Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu de 1120 a 1130, em Arnstein, Kreis Witzenhausen, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, e foi sepultado em Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Alemanha.

ru.Arnstein, Nassau Germany: арнстин, крис виценаусен, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Ludwig von Arnstein II родился в 1080 г. в местности клостир арнстин, силбач, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Ludwig I. von Arnstein было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Guda van Zutphen, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Udelhilde von Odenkirchen в местности нассау, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер с 1120 по 1130 в местности арнстин, крис виценаусен, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия и был похоронен в местности вецлар, лахн-диллькрис, Гессен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Count Ludwig von Arnstein II nació en 1080, en Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Ludwig I. von Arnstein, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Guda van Zutphen, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Udelhilde von Odenkirchen en Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió desde 1120 hasta 1130, en Arnstein, Kreis Witzenhausen, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, y fue sepultado en Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Alemania.
